metadata.source: IMC reports, Free Press Journal, Smart City Indore

hotspots.name: Khajrana Square
hotspots.description: Major junction on Ring Road — chronic waterlogging during monsoon due to low gradient

hotspots.name: Musakhedi Square
hotspots.description: Ring Road underpass floods repeatedly — drainage capacity insufficient

hotspots.description: Saucer-shaped terrain causes water accumulation at Ring Road junction

hotspots.description: Low-lying area near IT Park — Khan River overflow zone

hotspots.description: Ring Road junction with poor stormwater drainage

hotspots.description: Water accumulates due to slope — drainage issues and traffic disruptions

hotspots.description: Junction flooding from multiple road convergence

hotspots.name: Robert Square
hotspots.description: Historic area with aging drainage infrastructure

hotspots.name: Sayaji Square

hotspots.name: Industry House Square
hotspots.description: Commercial area with impervious surfaces causing high runoff

hotspots.description: Residential area with inadequate drainage capacity

hotspots.name: Teen Imli Square

hotspots.description: Residential area with overwhelmed stormwater drains

hotspots.name: Radisson Square

hotspots.description: Waterlogging at underpass during moderate rainfall

hotspots.description: Low-lying residential area with chronic drainage issues
